name: DevFlow
description: A developer productivity platform with integrated project management, code review workflows, and automated deployment pipelines.

name: API Gateway Pro
description: High-performance API gateway with rate limiting, authentication, request transformation, and real-time analytics dashboard.

name: QueryOptimizer
description: Intelligent SQL query analyzer and optimizer. Provides real-time suggestions, execution plan visualization, and performance benchmarking.
